name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT n   (* Number of processes *), RANGE, Range

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
\* Variables:
\*    *num[p] : current ticket number held by process p (or 0 when not choosing)
\*    *flag[p]: whether process p is currently selecting a ticket
VARIABLES num, flag

vars == <<num, flag>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
TypeOK ==
        /\ num \subseteq [1 .. MaxTicket]
           (\* bounded range for tickets - choose sufficiently large constant *)
          \/ num = [p \in ProcessSet |-> 0]
        /\ flag \subseteq [ProcessSet -> BOOLEAN]

(\* Helper definitions \*)
ProcessSet == {i \mid i \in 1..n}
MaxTicket == 2*n     \* upper bound on possible ticket values

maxNum(p) == CHOOSE m IN MAX(num[~]) :
                LET candidates == {k \mid k \in 1..m} UNION {MAXNUM+1}
            OBTAIN max(candidates)

nextNumber(p) == IF flag' = [q \in ProcessSet |\> FALSE] THEN 
                    /* after all flags cleared */


                         new

nextAvailable() == MIN({t + 1 \mid t \in Range(num)} INTERSECT {1 .. MaxTicket})

choosePhase(p) ==
   /\ flag'[p] = TRUE
      (* other processes keep their current state unchanged during choosing phase *)

assignPhase(p) ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>
       /\ num'[p] = (IF flag[p] THEN min{t + 1 : t \in RANGE(num)} else 0)
           (\* pick smallest unused number greater than any existing *)
          \/ num'[p] = 0
             /\ flag'[p] = FALSE

enterCriticalSection(p) ==
        /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>> 

leaveCriticalSection(p) ==
        /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Init ==
     /\ n >= 2
     /\ num = [i \in ProcessSet |-> 0]
     /\ flag = [i \in ProcessSet |-> FALSE]

Next ==
\* For each process p we define a disjunct that describes its possible actions.
\/ \E p \in ProcessSet :
         choosePhase(p)

\/ \E p \in ProcessSet :
         assignPhase(p)

\/ \E p \in ProcessSet :
         enterCriticalSection(p)

\/ Terminating = 
            /* allow the system to stay forever in some configuration */
            /\ UNCHANGED vars

Spec == Init /\ []_[vars]( Next )

====
